name: SEO seed keyword generator with AI and Google Sheets
description: Uses Claude AI to generate SEO seed keywords based on an ideal customer profile and business niche, validates them against Exa web search, and saves the ranked keyword list to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Generate SEO seed keywords using AI

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for validating keyword search volume

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving keyword list

businessNiche.description: Your business niche or industry (e.g. 'B2B SaaS project management')

idealCustomer.description: Ideal customer profile (e.g. 'CTOs at mid-size tech companies looking for team productivity tools')

steps.name: Build AI prompt for seed keyword generation
Run Claude AI to generate seed keywords
Build Exa query to validate top keywords
Validate keywords against Exa web search
Save keyword list to Google Sheets
